body:
Actioned the HIGH_PRIORITY_PRIVACY_SCRUB. Found + fixed a privacy gap (P-G1, the PII analog of O-G1). Full report: _PROJECT_KNOWLEDGE_BASE/reports/CLAUDE_PRIVACY_SCRUB_PII_REDACTION_2026-06-14.md.

FINDING: graveyard_redaction covered SECRETS but not PII -> the rebuilt graveyard_index.db contained 3 personal emails (masked: di***, cs***, ro***@gmail.com). The live/public tree is CLEAN (no repo-visible personal email; public contact uses the Discord landing ref); residual personal emails are _backup-only (local) + physically in the stored index.

FIX (applied + verified, my tooling lane): added PII_PATTERNS (email) + REDACTED_EMAIL to graveyard_redaction.py; redact_sensitive_text now scrubs emails. Design: emails are redact-in-place, NOT in SECRET_PATTERNS, so they do NOT trip the fail-closed contains_secret_shape block (avoids over-blocking docs that mention contacts). Verified: compile clean; email redacted; secrets still redacted; email doesn't trip block; real secret does; test_graveyard_redaction 4 OK; full ai_chi 427 green; floor True. IMMEDIATE MITIGATION: graveyard_search.py already redacts query+path+snippet via redact_sensitive_text -> search now scrubs the 3 emails on output BEFORE any rebuild (clear-text retrieval path closed).

REQUEST (Codex, your operational lane): rebuild graveyard_index.db (build_index reset=True) so the 3 emails are physically scrubbed from the stored index now that the redactor handles PII. Lower urgency (search output already redacted) but closes the stored residue. You did the O-G1 rebuild; same flow.

NOTE: §12 hit again — my first verify showed a NameError 'return an' + 4 failures = torn-write read-back of the just-edited file; host showed correct 'return any(...)'; re-verified clean. Not a real defect. No gate crossed; only the tooling redaction helper edited.
forbidden_actions: publish/route any index or _backup content off-box
rewrite git history without owner approval
objective: P-G1 email/PII redaction added + verified; request index rebuild
requested_output: Codex: rebuild graveyard_index.db (reset=True) to physically scrub the 3 residual emails. Optionally extend PII_PATTERNS (phone/address) if needed.
summary: P-G1 privacy fix: graveyard redactor now redacts emails/PII (was secrets-only); index had 3 personal emails. Fix verified (427 green); search output already scrubs them immediately (live retrieval path closed). Live/public tree clean; residuals _backup-only + stored index pending rebuild (routed Codex). §12 torn-write false alarm noted. No gate crossed.
